_comment: Next.js Claude Code settings by MarsDevs (www.marsdevs.com)

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi || true
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi || true

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(pnpm-lock\.yaml|package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|node_modules/|\.next/|prisma/migrations/)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files, node_modules, .next build output, or applied migrations.'; exit 1; fi
